steps: "File dividend tax refund claim with Dutch Belastingdienst using IB 92 form for EUR 22,193.60 excess withholding on UNA dividend",
"Submit evidence of Norwegian tax residency and NL-NO treaty entitlement to 15% rate (vs. 25% applied)",
"Provide ABN AMRO custody statement and holding confirmation for 520,000 UNA shares to support claim",
"Follow up with ABN AMRO on potential at-source relief procedures for future UNA dividends"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
